topic: Claude Code 'Prompt is too long' after auto-compaction fails (too_few_groups), headless/-p mode

sources.title: Error reference - Claude Code Docs (official)
key_facts: 'Prompt is too long' = conversation plus attached files exceeds the model's context window.
Recovery: run /compact to summarize earlier turns, or /clear to start fresh; /context shows the breakdown.
Auto-compact is on by default and normally prevents this error.
Claude Code auto-retries ONLY transient failures (5xx, 529 overloaded, timeouts, 429) up to 10x; request errors like 'Prompt is too long' are surfaced immediately, not retried.
For the auto-mode classifier variant: 'In non-interactive mode the run aborts because the transcript only grows and retrying cannot succeed.'

sources.title: [BUG] Claude Code fails with 'Prompt is too long' instead of auto-compacting · Issue #46348
key_facts: Auto-compaction fails to trigger near the limit; Claude Code returns repeated 'Prompt is too long'.
Reported as a regression (worked in earlier versions). Closed as duplicate.
